jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Ustraa - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Ustraa! We are hiring a Marketplace Manager for our Howrah team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Ustraa:
Ustraa is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ustraa!
